zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Bigod於1237年出生在英國越可爾澤特林頓時，她的父親Ralph Bigod22歲，母親Bertha Ferrers34歲。她於1261年與Edward Woodrove在英國越可爾皮克林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1313年在英國享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Bigod于1237年出生在英国越可爾澤特林頓时，她的父亲Ralph Bigod22岁，母亲Bertha Ferrers34岁。她于1261年与Edward Woodrove在英国越可爾皮克林结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1313年在英国享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Bigod was born in 1237, in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, her father, Ralph Bigod, was 22 and her mother, Bertha Ferrers, was 34. She married Edward Woodrove in 1261, in Pickering, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died in 1313, in England, at the age of 76.

Elle a épousé Edward Woodrove en 1261, à Pickering, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1313, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Bigod(이)가 1237년 영국 요르크실르 세트링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Bigod(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha Ferrers(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1261년 영국 요르크실르 피커잉에서 Edward Woodrove(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 영국에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Bigod родилась в 1237 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Bigod было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Bertha Ferrers, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Woodrove в 1261 г. в местности пиккиринг, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1313 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 76 лет.
